name: codex-mem
description: Persistent memory for Codex across sessions with recall and session compaction.

interface.shortDescription: Recall project decisions and user preferences across sessions.
interface.longDescription: Stores project-scoped memories, compacts session history, and retrieves relevant context for future Codex work.
interface.defaultPrompt: Recall past project decisions, remember durable facts, or compact the current session into memory.
